name: wix
description: Access Wix site data - store products, eCommerce orders, and CRM contacts via the Wix REST API

envVars.name: WIX_API_KEY
envVars.description: Wix API key from the API Keys Manager (sent raw in the Authorization header, no Bearer prefix)

envVars.name: WIX_SITE_ID
envVars.description: ID of the Wix site to operate on (visible in the site dashboard URL after /dashboard/)

tools.name: Query Products
tools.description: Query Wix Stores catalog products with filtering, sorting, and paging

query.description: Query options, e.g. {"filter":"{\"name\":{\"$contains\":\"shirt\"}}","paging":{"limit":25,"offset":0}} (filter is a stringified JSON object)

includeVariants.description: Whether to include product variants in the response

tools.name: Search Orders
tools.description: Search Wix eCommerce orders with filtering, sorting, and cursor paging

tools.name: Get Order
tools.description: Get full details of a single eCommerce order, including line items, totals, and buyer info

tools.name: Query Contacts
tools.description: Query CRM contacts with filtering, sorting, and paging (up to 1000 per request)

tools.name: Create Fulfillment
tools.description: Mark eCommerce order line items as fulfilled, optionally with shipping tracking info

fulfillment.description: Fulfillment to create, e.g. {"lineItems":[{"id":"<line item id>","quantity":1}],"trackingInfo":{"trackingNumber":"...","shippingProvider":"ups"}} (lineItems required; line item IDs come from Get Order)

tools.name: Create Contact
tools.description: Create a new CRM contact with at least a name, email address, or phone number

info.description: Contact info with at least one of name, email, or phone, e.g. {"name":{"first":"Jane","last":"Doe"},"emails":{"items":[{"email":"jane@example.com"}]}}

allowDuplicates.description: Create the contact even if the email is already in use by another contact (defaults to false)

tools.name: Create Product
tools.description: Create a new product in the Wix Stores catalog

prompts.title: Recent orders
prompts.prompt: Search my Wix store for the most recent orders and summarize their statuses and totals.

prompts.title: Catalog overview
prompts.prompt: Query my Wix Stores products and give me an overview of the catalog including prices and visibility.

prompts.title: Find a contact
prompts.prompt: Query my Wix contacts to find a customer by name or email.

SETUP_GUIDE.title: Wix setup

steps.title: Get a Wix site
steps.description: Use an existing Wix site or create a free one at https://www.wix.com - add the Wix Stores app if you want to use the product and order tools. Note: the product tools target Stores Catalog V1; sites created from Q2 2025 onward typically use Catalog V3, where the stores/v1 endpoints do not work (a site supports either V1 or V3, never both).

steps.title: Create an API key
steps.description: As the account owner or co-owner, open the API Keys Manager (https://manage.wix.com/account/api-keys), create a key, and grant it the permissions you need (e.g. Wix Stores, eCommerce, Contacts). Set the key as WIX_API_KEY.

steps.title: Find your site ID
steps.description: Open the site's dashboard - the site ID is the GUID in the URL after /dashboard/ (or use the Query Sites API). Set it as WIX_SITE_ID.

steps.title: Verify access
steps.description: Run the Query Products tool (empty body works) to confirm the key and site ID are wired correctly.

notes: The API key goes in the Authorization header as a raw value - no Bearer prefix
Every site-level call also requires the wix-site-id header, which this connector sends automatically from WIX_SITE_ID
Site-level calls only work with API keys generated from the site owner's account
Stores v1 query endpoints take the filter as a stringified JSON value inside the query object

The Query Products and Create Product tools use the Stores Catalog V1 API - on newer sites running Catalog V3 these endpoints fail; see the Catalog V1-to-V3 migration guide at https://dev.wix.com/docs/api-reference for the stores/v3 equivalents
